title: Dishis Designer Jewellery is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Dishis Designer Jewellery is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate E-commerce Executive with drive and ambition, Dishis Designer Jewellery in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dishis Designer Jewellery:
Dishis Designer Jewellery is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dishis Designer Jewellery!
